title: On $W^{2,\varepsilon}$-estimates for a class of singular-degenerate parabolic equations
summary: We study a class of parabolic equations in non-divergence form with measurable coefficients that are singular, degenerate, or both singular and degenerate through a weight belonging to the $A_{1+\frac{1}{n}}$ -Muckenhoupt class of weights. Under some smallness assumption on a weighted mean oscillation of the weight, F.-H. Lin type weighted $W^{2,\varepsilon}$-estimates are proved. To prove the result, we establish a result on local quantitative lower estimates of solutions to the class of equations, which are known as the mean sojourn times of sample paths within sets. This type of estimate was proved by L. C. Evans for the class of linear elliptic equations in non-divergence form with uniformly elliptic and bounded measurable coefficients. A class of weighted parabolic cylinders intrinsically suitable for the class of equations is introduced. The parabolic ABP estimates, and a perturbation method are used to overcome the singularity and degeneracy of the coefficients. Careful analysis on regularization and truncation of the weights is performed. The paper provides foundational ingredients and estimates for the study of fully nonlinear parabolic equations with singular-degenerate coefficients.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有奇异退化系数的非散度型抛物方程的加权W^{2,ε}估计
AI.motivation: 研究具有可测系数的非散度型抛物方程，这些系数通过属于A_{1+1/n}权类的权函数而奇异、退化或同时奇异退化，旨在建立加权正则性估计
AI.techniques: 引入适合方程类的加权抛物柱体，使用抛物ABP估计和摄动方法，对权函数进行正则化和截断的精细分析，建立局部定量下界估计
AI.main_theorems: 在权函数的加权平均振荡满足小性假设下，证明了F.-H. Lin型加权W^{2,ε}估计；建立了该类方程解的局部定量下界估计（样本路径在集合中的平均逗留时间）
AI.significance: 为研究具有奇异退化系数的完全非线性抛物方程提供了基础性成分和估计，推广了L. C. Evans对线性椭圆方程的结果到抛物情形

title: A fourth-order regularization of the curvature flow of immersed plane curves with Dirichlet boundary conditions
summary: We consider a fourth-order regularization of the curvature flow for an immersed plane curve with fixed boundary, using an elastica-type functional depending on a small positive parameter $\varepsilon$. We show that the approximating flow smoothly converges, as $\varepsilon \to 0^+$, to the curvature flow of the curve with Dirichlet boundary conditions for all times before the first singularity of the limit flow.

AI.tldr: 证明了带固定边界的平面曲线曲率流的四阶正则化逼近在奇点出现前光滑收敛到原曲率流
AI.motivation: 研究平面曲线曲率流的正则化逼近问题，通过引入依赖于小参数ε的弹性型泛函来构造四阶正则化流，解决带Dirichlet边界条件的曲线演化收敛性问题
AI.techniques: 使用四阶正则化方法、弹性型泛函、小参数渐近分析、偏微分方程理论、曲线演化几何分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当ε→0⁺时，正则化流光滑收敛到原曲率流，且收敛在极限流第一个奇点出现前的时间区间内成立
AI.significance: 为曲率流提供了一种有效的正则化逼近方法，建立了高阶正则化与低阶几何流之间的收敛性理论，对几何偏微分方程和曲线演化理论有重要意义

title: Uniform subelliptic estimates for degenerating Fokker-Planck equations
summary: We expand upon recent work of Hernandez-Ranard-Riedel, Galkowski-Zworski, and Li, by proving long time bounds for solutions to certain Fokker-Planck equations with subelliptic diffusion term. We consider the case where the jump operators in the Lindbladian are linear functions of $x$, and place an assumption which implies that the Hörmander condition holds for the resulting Fokker-Planck equation. By constructing a suitable parametrix for this equation we show that semiclassical derivative estimates established in the above works for elliptic diffusion also hold for subelliptic diffusion, with global bounds in $L^p$ for all $1\le p\le \infty$.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有亚椭圆扩散项的Fokker-Planck方程解的长时间界，将椭圆扩散的半经典导数估计推广到亚椭圆情形
AI.motivation: 扩展Hernandez-Ranard-Riedel、Galkowski-Zworski和Li等人的近期工作，研究Lindbladian中跳跃算子是x的线性函数时的Fokker-Planck方程，在Hörmander条件成立的情况下分析亚椭圆扩散的长时间行为
AI.techniques: 构造合适的参数化算子(parametrix)，将椭圆扩散的半经典导数估计技术推广到亚椭圆情形，使用全局L^p界分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于满足Hörmander条件的亚椭圆扩散Fokker-Planck方程，先前在椭圆扩散中建立的半经典导数估计同样成立，且对所有1≤p≤∞具有全局L^p界
AI.significance: 将量子动力学和统计物理中的重要估计从椭圆扩散推广到更一般的亚椭圆情形，为研究非平衡统计力学和量子开放系统中的亚椭圆扩散问题提供了新的分析工具

title: Hardy decomposition of first order Lipschitz functions by Lamé-Navier solutions
summary: The Clifford algebra language allows us to rewrite the Lamé-Navier system in terms of the Euclidean Dirac operator. In this paper, the main question we shall be concerned with is whether or not a higher order Lipschitz function on the boundary $Γ$ of a Jordan domain $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^m$ can be decomposed into a sum of the two boundary values of a solution of the Lamé-Navier system with jump across $Γ$. Our main tool are the Hardy projections related to a singular integral operator arising in the context of Clifford analysis, which turns out to be an involution operator on the first order Lipschitz classes.

AI.tldr: 利用Clifford代数将Lamé-Navier系统重写为欧几里得Dirac算子形式，研究高阶Lipschitz函数能否分解为Lamé-Navier系统解在边界上的跳跃值之和
AI.motivation: 研究弹性力学中的Lamé-Navier系统在边界值问题中的分解性质，探索高阶Lipschitz函数在边界上的表示问题，将经典弹性理论与Clifford分析框架相结合
AI.techniques: Clifford代数方法、欧几里得Dirac算子、奇异积分算子、Hardy投影、Lipschitz函数空间分析、边界值分解技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了Lamé-Navier系统解在边界上的跳跃分解定理，证明了奇异积分算子在Lipschitz类上的对合性质，获得了高阶Lipschitz函数的边界值分解条件
AI.significance: 为弹性力学边界值问题提供了新的分析框架，建立了Clifford分析与经典弹性理论之间的联系，发展了处理高阶Lipschitz函数边界值分解的新方法

title: On behavior of free boundaries to generalized two-phase Stefan problems for parabolic partial differential equation systems
summary: Recently, we have proposed a new free boundary problem representing the bread baking process in a hot oven. Unknown functions in this problem are the position of the evaporation front, the temperature field and the water content. For solving this problem we observed two difficulties that the growth rate of the free boundary depends on the water content and the boundary condition for the water content contains the temperature. In this paper, by improving the regularity of solutions, we overcome these difficulties and establish existence of a solution locally in time and its uniqueness. Moreover, under some sign conditions for initial data, we derive a result on the maximal interval of existence to solutions.

AI.tldr: 通过提高解的正则性，解决了面包烘烤过程中自由边界问题的存在性、唯一性和最大存在区间问题
AI.motivation: 研究面包在热烤箱中烘烤过程的自由边界问题，该问题包含蒸发前沿位置、温度场和含水量三个未知函数，面临自由边界增长率依赖于含水量以及含水量边界条件包含温度两个困难
AI.techniques: 通过提高解的正则性来克服困难，建立局部时间解的存在性和唯一性，并在初始数据的某些符号条件下推导最大存在区间
AI.main_theorems: 建立了该自由边界问题局部时间解的存在性和唯一性定理，并在特定初始数据符号条件下给出了解的最大存在区间结果
AI.significance: 为面包烘烤过程的数学模型提供了严格的数学理论基础，发展了处理具有耦合边界条件的自由边界问题的新方法，对食品加工和相变问题的数学建模有重要意义

title: Liouville-type theorems for the stationary non-Newtonian fluids in a slab
summary: In this paper, we investigate Liouville-type theorems for stationary solutions to the shear thickening fluid equations in a slab. We show that the axisymmetric solution must be trivial if its local $L^\infty$-norm grows mildly as the radius $R$ grows. Also, a bounded general solution $u$ must be trivial if $ru^r$ is bounded. The proof is inspired by the work of Bang, Gui, Wang, and Xie [J. Fluid Mech. 1005 (2025)] for the Navier-Stokes equations, and the key point is to establish a Saint-Venant type estimate that characterizes the growth of the local Dirichlet integral of nontrivial solutions. One new ingredient is the estimate of the constant in Korn's inequality over different domains.

AI.tldr: 建立了剪切增稠流体方程在平板区域中稳态解的Liouville型定理，证明在一定增长条件下轴对称解和平凡解的唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究剪切增稠流体方程稳态解的Liouville型定理，这类方程在非牛顿流体力学中具有重要意义，特别是在高剪切速率下粘度增加的现象
AI.techniques: 采用Saint-Venant型估计刻画非平凡解的局部Dirichlet积分增长，利用Korn不等式在不同区域上的常数估计，借鉴Navier-Stokes方程的相关方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 轴对称解在局部L∞范数随半径R温和增长时必为平凡解；2. 有界一般解在ru^r有界时必为平凡解
AI.significance: 将Navier-Stokes方程的Liouville型定理推广到剪切增稠流体方程，为研究非牛顿流体稳态解的唯一性提供了新工具，对理解非牛顿流体动力学有理论意义

title: The Kato square root estimate with Robin boundary conditions
summary: We prove the Kato square root estimate for second-order divergence form elliptic operators $-div(A\nabla)$ on a bounded, locally uniform domain $D \subseteq \mathbb{R}^n$, for accretive coefficients $A \in L^\infty(D; \mathbb{C}^n)$, under the Robin boundary condition $ν\cdot A\nabla u + bu = 0$ for a (possibly unbounded) boundary conductivity $b$. In contrast to essentially all previous estimates of Kato square root operators, no first-order approach seems possible for the Robin boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 证明了在有界局部一致域上带Robin边界条件的二阶散度型椭圆算子的Kato平方根估计
AI.motivation: 研究带Robin边界条件（ν·A∇u + bu = 0）的椭圆算子的Kato平方根估计，其中边界电导率b可能无界，这是对传统Dirichlet和Neumann边界条件的重要推广
AI.techniques: 采用非一阶方法（与先前研究不同），处理无界边界电导率b，在局部一致域上工作，使用散度形式椭圆算子理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在有界局部一致域D上，对于增生系数A∈L^∞(D;C^n)和（可能无界）边界电导率b，带Robin边界条件的椭圆算子-div(A∇)满足Kato平方根估计
AI.significance: 首次在Robin边界条件下获得Kato平方根估计，突破了传统一阶方法的限制，为处理更一般的边界条件提供了理论框架，在椭圆边值问题和演化方程理论中有重要应用

title: Hyperbolic regularization effects for degenerate elliptic equations
summary: This paper investigates the regularity of Lipschitz solutions $u$ to the general two-dimensional equation $\text{div}(G(Du))=0$ with highly degenerate ellipticity. Just assuming strict monotonicity of the field $G$ and heavily relying on the differential inclusions point of view, we establish a pointwise gradient localization theorem and we show that the singular set of nondifferentiability points of $u$ is $\mathcal{H}^1$-negligible. As a consequence, we derive new sharp partial $C^1$ regularity results under the assumption that $G$ is degenerate only on curves. This is done by exploiting the hyperbolic structure of the equation along these curves, where the loss of regularity is compensated using tools from the theories of Hamilton-Jacobi equations and scalar conservation laws. Our analysis recovers and extends all the previously known results, where the degeneracy set was required to be zero-dimensional.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维高度退化椭圆方程Lipschitz解的梯度局部化定理，证明了奇异集是Hausdorff一维可忽略的，并获得了新的尖锐部分C^1正则性结果
AI.motivation: 研究二维高度退化椭圆方程div(G(Du))=0的Lipschitz解的正则性，特别是当G仅在曲线上退化时的正则性问题，扩展了以往仅考虑零维退化集的结果
AI.techniques: 采用微分包含观点，利用Hamilton-Jacobi方程和标量守恒律理论工具，分析沿退化曲线的双曲结构，建立梯度局部化定理
AI.main_theorems: 1. 点态梯度局部化定理；2. 不可微点的奇异集是H^1可忽略的；3. 当G仅在曲线上退化时，获得新的尖锐部分C^1正则性结果
AI.significance: 将退化椭圆方程的正则性理论从零维退化集扩展到一维退化集，建立了处理曲线退化情况的新框架，统一并扩展了该领域所有已知结果

title: Hypocoercivity and metastability of degenerate KFP equations at low temperature
summary: We consider Kramers-Fokker-Planck operators with general degenerate coefficients. We prove semiclassical hypocoercivity estimates for a large class of such operators. Then, we manage to prove Eyring-Kramers formulas for the bottom of the spectrum of some particular degenerate operators in the semiclassical regime, and quantify the spectral gap separating these eigenvalues from the rest of the spectrum. The main ingredient is the construction of sharp Gaussian quasimodes through an adaptation of the WKB method.

AI.tldr: 证明了Kramers-Fokker-Planck算子在一般退化系数下的半经典次压缩估计，并对特定退化算子建立了Eyring-Kramers公式和谱隙量化。
AI.motivation: 研究具有一般退化系数的Kramers-Fokker-Planck算子，这类算子在统计力学和随机过程中描述粒子在势场中的运动，退化系数对应物理系统中的非各向同性扩散。
AI.techniques: 半经典分析、次压缩估计、WKB方法构造高斯拟模、谱隙量化技术、退化椭圆算子的微局部分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对一大类退化KFP算子证明了半经典次压缩估计；2. 对特定退化算子在半经典区域建立了Eyring-Kramers公式；3. 量化了谱底特征值与谱其余部分的谱隙。
AI.significance: 扩展了KFP算子的谱理论到退化情形，为理解非平衡统计力学中的弛豫过程提供了严格数学基础，发展了处理退化扩散过程的半经典分析方法。

title: The Semigeostrophic-Euler Limit: Lifespan Lower Bounds and $O(\varepsilon)$ Velocity Stability
summary: We study the two-dimensional semigeostrophic (SG$^{\varepsilon}$) system on the torus in the small-amplitude scaling and its convergence to incompressible Euler in the dual (geostrophic) formulation. Within a natural bootstrap regime for the Poisson/Monge-Ampère coupling, we obtain two main results. First, we prove a lifespan lower bound in slow time with a \emph{log-log} gain; in physical time this yields persistence at least on the scale $\varepsilon^{-1}|\log\log \varepsilon|$. Second, on any bootstrap window we establish a strong velocity-stability estimate with rate $O(\varepsilon)$ in $L^2$, complementing Loeper's $O(1/\varepsilon)$ existence time and $\varepsilon^{2/3}$ weak convergence rate. The proofs combine the incompressible transport structure with a sharp elliptic control of the velocity gradient and a flow-based stability argument. Overall, the results give a clean quantitative bridge from SG$^{\varepsilon}$ to Euler that is both longer-lived (by a log-log factor) and quantitatively stable in velocity.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维半地转系统在小振幅尺度下到不可压缩欧拉系统的长时间存在性和强速度稳定性估计
AI.motivation: 研究二维半地转系统(SG$^{\varepsilon}$)在小振幅尺度下向不可压缩欧拉系统的收敛问题，特别是存在时间尺度和收敛速度的定量分析
AI.techniques: 结合不可压缩输运结构、速度梯度的尖锐椭圆控制、基于流动的稳定性论证，以及在泊松/蒙日-安培耦合的自然自举框架下进行分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在慢时间尺度下获得带log-log增益的存在时间下界；2. 在任何自举窗口上建立$L^2$范数下$O(\varepsilon)$的强速度稳定性估计
AI.significance: 为半地转系统到欧拉系统的收敛提供了既长时间存在又定量稳定的桥梁，改进了Loeper的$O(1/\varepsilon)$存在时间和$\varepsilon^{2/3}$弱收敛率结果

title: Semiclassical analysis of the magnetic Laplacian on hyperbolic surfaces
comment: To appear in Journées équations aux dérivées partielles (2025)
summary: The magnetic Laplacian on hyperbolic surfaces provides a rich analytic framework in which a variety of quantum phenomena emerge. The present note, written for the \emph{Proceedings of the Journées EDP 2025}, is a concise overview of the main results obtained in [arXiv:2505.08584] and work in preparation by the author with L. Charles and A. Chabert.

AI.tldr: 该论文综述了双曲曲面上磁拉普拉斯算子的主要结果，包括谱性质、量子隧穿和半经典极限等量子现象
AI.motivation: 研究双曲曲面上磁拉普拉斯算子的解析框架，探索其中涌现的各种量子现象，为Journées EDP 2025会议提供综述性介绍
AI.techniques: 磁拉普拉斯算子理论、谱分析、半经典分析、量子隧穿理论、双曲几何方法
AI.main_theorems: 基于arXiv:2505.08584和与L. Charles、A. Chabert合作的工作，总结了双曲曲面上磁拉普拉斯算子的主要结果，包括谱性质、量子隧穿效应和半经典极限行为
AI.significance: 为双曲几何与量子物理的交叉研究提供理论框架，深化对磁拉普拉斯算子在非欧几里得几何中量子现象的理解，具有数学物理和谱理论的重要意义

title: Boundedness in a two-dimensional doubly degenerate nutrient taxis system with logistic source
summary:
We are concerned with the following doubly degenerate nutrient taxis system  egin{align}  egin{cases}	ag{$\star$}\label{eq-0.1} u_t=
abla\cdot(u v
abla u)-
abla\cdot(u^{2} v
abla v)+u-u^2,\[1mm] v_t=Δv-u v, \end{cases} \end{align} posed in a bounded smooth domain $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^2$ under homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions. This model was introduced to describe the aggregation patterns of colonies of \emph{Bacillus subtilis} observed on thin agar plates. Previous results have established global boundedness in one space dimension and, in two dimensions, under additional assumptions such as small initial data or convex domains (see, e.g., M. Winkler, 	extit{Trans. Amer. Math. Soc.}, 2021; M. Winkler, 	extit{J. Differ. Equ.}, 2024). In the presence of the quadratic degradation term in the logistic growth, which markedly enhances the dissipative structure of the system, and by employing a weighted energy method, we prove that for arbitrary smooth initial data the problem \eqref{eq-0.1} admits a global weak solution that remains uniformly bounded in time.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维双退化营养趋化系统在任意光滑初值下存在全局有界弱解
AI.motivation: 研究描述枯草芽孢杆菌在薄琼脂板上聚集模式的双退化营养趋化系统，该模型包含退化扩散和趋化项，先前结果需要一维或二维小初值/凸域等额外假设
AI.techniques: 加权能量方法，利用逻辑增长中的二次退化项增强系统耗散结构，处理退化扩散和趋化项的非线性耦合
AI.main_theorems: 在二维有界光滑区域上，对任意光滑初值，系统存在全局有界弱解，解在时间上一致有界
AI.significance: 首次在二维情况下无需小初值或凸域假设建立了全局有界解的存在性，为双退化趋化系统的理论分析提供了新方法

title: Improved convergence rates in the fast-reaction approximation of the triangular Shigesada-Kawasaki-Teramoto system
summary: We consider the fast-reaction approximation to the triangular Shigesada-Kawasaki-Teramoto model on a bounded domain in the physical dimension $d\le 3$. We provide explicit convergence rates on the whole domain in $\textnormal{L}^\infty\textnormal{L}^2\cap\textnormal{L}^2\textnormal{H}^1$ and in the interior we prove convergence with an explicit rate in any $\textnormal{L}^\infty\textnormal{H}^l$ for all $l > 0$.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了三角形Shigesada-Kawasaki-Teramoto模型的快反应近似，在物理维度d≤3的有界域上给出了明确的收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 研究三角形Shigesada-Kawasaki-Teramoto模型的快反应极限问题，该模型是描述种群动力学和化学反应扩散系统的重要数学模型。快反应近似是研究反应扩散系统中时间尺度分离现象的关键数学问题。
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计、正则性理论和内估计方法，结合L∞L²∩L²H¹空间和L∞H^l空间的分析技术，通过显式收敛速率估计处理快反应极限问题。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在整个域上获得L∞L²∩L²H¹空间中的显式收敛速率；2. 在内部区域获得任意L∞H^l空间中的显式收敛速率，适用于所有l>0。
AI.significance: 为三角形反应扩散系统的快反应极限提供了严格的数学分析，给出了显式收敛速率，深化了对多尺度反应扩散系统极限行为的理解，对种群动力学和化学反应工程有理论指导意义。

title: On Navier-Stokes equations arising from the rotation of an obstacle in a fluid
summary: We consider the modified Navier-Stokes equations in R3 describing the motion of a fluid in the presence of a rotating rigid body. Weighted Sobolev spaces are used to describe the behavior of solutions at large distances. Under suitable assumptions, w e prove the existence and regularity of solutions satisfying appropriate conditions at infinity.

AI.tldr: 证明了带有旋转刚体的修正Navier-Stokes方程在加权Sobolev空间中的存在性和正则性
AI.motivation: 研究三维空间中存在旋转刚体时的修正Navier-Stokes方程，这类问题在流体力学中描述流体与旋转物体的相互作用，需要处理无穷远处的边界条件
AI.techniques: 使用加权Sobolev空间来描述解在无穷远处的渐近行为，通过适当的函数空间框架处理无界区域问题
AI.main_theorems: 在适当假设下证明了满足无穷远处适当条件的解的存在性和正则性
AI.significance: 为旋转刚体与流体相互作用问题提供了严格的数学理论框架，扩展了Navier-Stokes方程在无界区域中的存在性理论

title: Critical blow-up lines in a two-species quasilinear chemotaxis system with two chemicals

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有两个化学信号的拟线性双物种趋化系统，建立了临界线来区分解的全局有界性、有限时间爆破和全局存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有两个化学信号的拟线性双物种趋化系统的动力学行为，这类系统在生物学中描述细胞通过化学信号相互作用的复杂现象。需要理解在什么参数条件下解会全局存在、全局有界或发生有限时间爆破。
AI.techniques: 使用拟线性抛物方程理论、能量估计方法、比较原理、径向对称性分析，以及针对球域的特殊构造技术来建立爆破解的存在性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在球域中，当q-p>2-n/2且q>1-n/2时，存在径向对称初始数据使得解在有限时间内爆破；2. 在一般光滑有界域中，当q-p<2-n/2时，所有解全局有界；3. 在一般光滑有界域中，当q<1-n/2时，所有解全局存在。
AI.significance: 建立了双物种趋化系统的完整动力学分类，发现了两条临界线q-p=2-n/2和q=1-n/2，这为理解复杂趋化系统的爆破机制提供了理论框架，对生物数学和偏微分方程理论有重要贡献。

title: Critical blow-up curve in a two-species chemotaxis system with two chemicals involving flux-limitation

AI.tldr: 该论文确定了带通量限制的双物种趋化系统在临界曲线 $p=q=\frac{n-2}{n-1}$ 上的爆破行为，建立了有限时间爆破与全局存在性的完整分类。
AI.motivation: 研究带通量限制的双物种趋化系统，这类系统描述两种生物种群通过化学信号相互作用的动力学行为。通量限制项 $(1+|\nabla v|^2)^{-\frac{p}{2}}$ 和 $(1+|\nabla z|^2)^{-\frac{q}{2}}$ 模拟了趋化响应的饱和效应，旨在理解参数 $p,q$ 如何影响解的爆破行为。
AI.techniques: 使用径向对称性构造爆破解，通过比较原理和能量估计方法分析解的爆破条件。对于全局存在性，利用椭圆方程的正则性估计和 Sobolev 嵌入定理，结合通量限制项的特殊结构控制非线性项的增长。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在球域 $B_R(0) \subset \mathbb{R}^n$ ($n\geq 3$) 中，若 $0<p,q<\frac{n-2}{n-1}$，存在径向对称初值使得解在有限时间内爆破。2. 在任意光滑有界域中，若 $n=1$（任意 $p,q$）或 $n\geq 2$ 且 $p>\frac{n-2}{n-1}$ 或 $q>\frac{n-2}{n-1}$，则解全局存在且有界。临界曲线为 $p=q=\frac{n-2}{n-1}$。
AI.significance: 首次完整刻画了带通量限制的双物种趋化系统的爆破临界行为，揭示了空间维数 $n$ 与通量限制参数 $p,q$ 之间的精确关系。该结果为理解趋化系统中非线性扩散与聚集平衡提供了重要理论依据，对生物数学和偏微分方程理论均有贡献。

title: Nodal set comparison for Allen--Cahn solutions with conical asymptotics
summary: We establish a comparison principle for entire solutions of the Allen--Cahn equation whose nodal sets, possibly singular, are asymptotic to a regular minimizing hypercone. We show that inclusion of the positive phases enforces a global ordering of the solutions. As a consequence, the positive phase uniquely determines the solution, and strict phase inclusion implies that the corresponding nodal sets are disjoint. Our analysis relies on a maximum principle for the linearized operator on unbounded domains that are not necessarily smooth, and yields an Allen--Cahn analogue of the strong maximum principle for minimal hypersurfaces.

AI.tldr: 建立了Allen-Cahn方程整体解的比较原理，证明了正相包含强制解的全局排序，正相唯一确定解，且严格相包含导致相应节点集不相交。
AI.motivation: 研究Allen-Cahn方程整体解的性质，特别是当节点集渐近于正则极小化超锥时。Allen-Cahn方程在相变和几何流中有重要应用，理解其解的结构和比较性质对几何分析有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 使用非光滑无界域上线性化算子的最大值原理，发展了Allen-Cahn方程的强最大值原理，类似于极小超曲面的强最大值原理。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了渐近于正则极小化超锥的Allen-Cahn方程整体解的比较原理；2. 证明了正相包含强制解的全局排序；3. 正相唯一确定解；4. 严格相包含导致相应节点集不相交。
AI.significance: 为Allen-Cahn方程理论提供了新的比较原理工具，建立了与极小曲面理论的深刻联系，对理解相变界面和几何流有重要理论意义。

title: Finite-time blow-up in a quasilinear two-species chemotaxis system with two chemicals
summary:
This paper investigates the finite-time blow-up phenomena to a quasilinear two-species chemotaxis system with two chemicals \begin{align}\tag{$\star$}
  \begin{cases}
  u_t = \nabla \cdot \left(D_1(u) \nabla u\right) - \nabla \cdot \left(u \nabla v\right), & x \in Ω, \ t > 0,
  0 = Δv - μ_2 + w, \quad μ_2=\fint_Ωw, & x \in Ω, \ t > 0,
  w_t = \nabla \cdot \left(D_2(w) \nabla w\right) - \nabla \cdot \left(w \nabla z\right), & x \in Ω, \ t > 0,
  0 = Δz - μ_1 + u, \quad μ_1=\fint_Ωu, & x \in Ω, \ t > 0,
  \frac{\partial u}{\partial ν} = \frac{\partial v}{\partial ν} = \frac{\partial w}{\partial ν} = \frac{\partial z}{\partial ν} = 0, & x \in \partial Ω, \ t > 0,
  u(x, 0) = u_0(x), \quad w(x, 0) = w_0(x), & x \in Ω,
  \end{cases} \end{align} where $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^n$ $(n \geqslant 3)$ is a smoothly bounded domain. The nonlinear diffusion functions \( D_1(s) \) and \( D_2(s) \) are of the following forms: \begin{align*}
  D_1(s)\simeq s^{m_1-1} \quad \text{and}\quad D_2(s) \simeq s^{m_2-1}, \quad m_1,m_2> 1 \end{align*} for $s\geqslant 1$.
  For the classical two-species chemotaxis system with two chemicals (i.e. the second and fourth equations are replaced by $0 = Δv - v + w$ and $0 = Δz - z + u$ ), Zhong [J. Math. Anal. Appl., 500 (2021), Paper No. 125130, pp. 22.] showed that the system possesses a globally bounded classical solution in the case that \[ m_1 + m_2 < \max\left\{m_1m_2 + \frac{2m_1}{ n},\ m_1m_2 + \frac{2m_2 }{ n}\right\}. \]
  Complementing the boundedness result, we prove that the system ($\star$) admits solutions that blow up in finite time, if \[ m_1 + m_2 > \max\left\{ m_1m_2 + \frac{2m_1}{ n},\ m_1m_2 + \frac{2m_2}{ n}\right\} \] with $n\geqslant 3$.

AI.tldr: 研究具有两种化学物质的拟线性双物种趋化系统中有限时间爆破现象的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究拟线性双物种趋化系统(具有两种化学物质)的爆破行为，该系统包含非线性扩散项D₁(u)≃u^{m₁-1}和D₂(w)≃w^{m₂-1}，以及非局部化学平衡方程，旨在补充Zhong(2021)关于全局有界解的结果。
AI.techniques: 使用能量方法、比较原理和爆破构造技术，通过分析非线性扩散指数m₁,m₂与空间维度n的关系，建立有限时间爆破的充分条件。
AI.main_theorems: 当n≥3且m₁+m₂ > max{m₁m₂+2m₁/n, m₁m₂+2m₂/n}时，系统存在有限时间爆破的解，这与Zhong的全局有界性条件形成互补。
AI.significance: 完善了拟线性双物种趋化系统的爆破理论，揭示了非线性扩散强度与爆破行为之间的临界关系，为理解多物种趋化系统的动力学行为提供了重要理论依据。

title: On the effects of protection zone and directed population flux in prey-predator dynamics
summary: We study a spatial predator-prey model in which prey can enter a protection zone (refuge) inaccessible to predators, while predators exhibit directed movement toward prey-rich regions. The directed movement is modeled by a far-sighted population flux motivated by classical movement rules, in contrast to the more commonly analyzed near-sighted chemotaxis-type mechanisms. We first establish local-in-time well-posedness for the corresponding nonstationary problem under Neumann boundary conditions, despite the discontinuity induced by the refuge interface. We then investigate the stationary problem, focusing on how the coexistence states emerge and organize globally in parameter space. In particular, we identify the bifurcation threshold for positive steady states from semitrivial predator-only equilibria, and describe the global continuation of the resulting branches. Our analysis reveals that strong directed movement can induce turning-point structures and multiplicity of coexistence steady states, highlighting a nontrivial interplay between spatial protection and predator movement behavior.

AI.tldr: 研究具有保护区和定向运动的捕食者-食饵空间模型，揭示强定向运动导致共存稳态的多重性和转折点结构
AI.motivation: 研究空间生态系统中捕食者-食饵相互作用，特别关注食饵可进入捕食者无法进入的保护区（避难所），以及捕食者向食饵丰富区域的定向运动。与常见的近视趋化机制不同，本文采用远见种群通量模型，探索空间保护与捕食者运动行为之间的非平凡相互作用。
AI.techniques: 使用偏微分方程理论，建立非定常问题的局部适定性（尽管存在避难所界面的不连续性）；采用分歧理论分析稳态问题；研究参数空间中全局共存态的出现和组织方式；识别从半平凡捕食者平衡态出发的正稳态分歧阈值。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在Neumann边界条件下建立非定常问题的局部适定性；2. 识别从半平凡捕食者平衡态出发的正稳态分歧阈值；3. 描述所得分支的全局延拓；4. 揭示强定向运动可诱导转折点结构和共存稳态的多重性。
AI.significance: 为空间生态学提供新的数学模型框架，揭示定向运动强度如何影响种群共存模式；理论结果对理解保护区设计、捕食者运动策略与种群动态的相互作用有重要意义；为具有不连续界面的反应扩散系统分析提供数学工具。

title: Non-linear parabolic PDEs with rough data and coefficients: existence, uniqueness and regularity of weak solutions in critical spaces
summary: This article investigates the well-posedness of weak solutions to non-linear parabolic PDEs driven by rough coefficients with rough initial data in critical homogeneous Besov spaces. Well-posedness is understood in the sense of existence and uniqueness of maximal weak solutions in suitable weighted $Z$-spaces in the absence of smallness conditions. We showcase our theory with an application to rough reaction--diffusion equations. Subsequent articles will treat further classes of equations, including equations of Burgers-type and quasi-linear problems, using the same approach. Our toolkit includes a novel theory of hypercontractive singular integral operators (SIOs) on weighted $Z$-spaces and a self-improving property for super-linear reverse Hölder inequalities.

AI.tldr: 建立了粗糙系数非线性抛物PDE在临界齐次Besov空间中弱解适定性的新理论框架
AI.motivation: 研究粗糙系数非线性抛物PDE在临界齐次Besov空间中弱解的适定性问题，特别关注无小性条件情形下的存在唯一性
AI.techniques: 加权Z空间理论、超压缩奇异积分算子理论、超线性反向Hölder不等式的自改进性质
AI.main_theorems: 在加权Z空间中建立了粗糙系数非线性抛物PDE最大弱解的存在唯一性定理，并应用于粗糙反应-扩散方程
AI.significance: 为处理粗糙系数和粗糙初值的非线性抛物方程提供了统一框架，后续可推广到Burgers型方程和拟线性问题

title: Sparsity and uniform regularity for regularised optimal transport
summary:
We consider regularised quadratic optimal transport with subquadratic polynomial or entropic regularisation. In both cases, we prove interior Lipschitz-estimates on a transport-like map and interior gradient Lipschitz-estimates on the potentials, under the assumption that the transport map solving the unregularised problem is bi-$C^{1,α}$-regular. For strictly subquadratic and entropic regularisation, the estimates improve to interior $C^1$ and $C^2$ estimates for the transport-like map and the potentials, respectively. Our estimates are uniform in the regularisation parameter. As a consequence of this, we obtain convergence of the transport-like map (resp. the potentials) to the unregularised transport map (resp. Kantorovich potentials) in $C^{0,1-}_{\mathrm{loc}}$ (resp. $C^{1,1-}_{\mathrm{loc}}$).
  Central to our approach are sharp local bounds on the size of the support for regularised optimal transport which we derive for a general convex, superlinear regularisation term. These bounds are of independent interest and imply global bias bounds for the regularised transport plans. Our global bounds, while not necessarily sharp, improve on the best known results in the literature for quadratic regularisation.

AI.tldr: 证明了正则化最优输运问题的内点正则性估计，包括输运映射的Lipschitz估计和势函数的梯度Lipschitz估计。
AI.motivation: 研究正则化最优输运问题（特别是二次成本函数）的正则性理论。当未正则化问题的解具有足够正则性时，探讨正则化问题解的内点正则性及其对正则化参数的一致估计。
AI.techniques: 推导正则化最优输运支撑集大小的局部尖锐界；利用凸超线性正则化项的泛函分析；建立对正则化参数一致的正则性估计；通过支撑集控制分析正则化效应。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在未正则化解为双C^{1,α}正则的假设下，证明了正则化输运映射的内点Lipschitz估计和势函数的内点梯度Lipschitz估计；2. 对于严格次二次和熵正则化，改进为内点C^1和C^2估计；3. 建立了正则化最优输运支撑集的局部尖锐界；4. 证明了正则化解向未正则化解在适当拓扑下的收敛性。
AI.significance: 为计算最优输运中的正则化方法提供了理论保证，证明了正则化解的正则性不劣于未正则化解，且估计对正则化参数一致，这为数值计算中正则化参数的选择提供了理论依据。支撑集界的结果改进了文献中二次正则化的全局偏差界。
